name: Growthpoint Properties Australia
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.2427. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.2673 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.2427, stop A$2.0790, target A$2.2700. Risk/reward is 0.17:1.
